description: A tenant has given their notice to vacate. The agent needs to schedule the final move-out inspection.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the tenant's notice to vacate and their official move-out date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the tenant and their move-out date.

nodes.task_description: Contact the tenant to coordinate a time for the inspection on their move-out day.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully communicates with the tenant to find a suitable time.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the inspection on the property manager's calendar and send a confirmation to the tenant with an inspection checklist.

expected_outcome.value: Agent books the appointment and provides the tenant with helpful information.
